scenes.speech: Welcome to Gal-chan Dojo! Gal-chan is here to train with you! 🥷
scenes.title: Welcome to the Dojo!
scenes.content: This is Gal-chan Dojo! Let's practice a little every day and polish our skills!

scenes.speech: Remember the three rules of the dojo!
scenes.title: Three Rules of the Dojo
scenes.content: Let's check the important rules to progress in our training!
scenes.highlight:
Dojo Rules:
1. Practice a little every day
2. Ask Gal-chan if you're unsure
3. Record what you've accomplished

scenes.speech: AI tools are your training 'equipment'! Use them wisely, Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Use AI as Your Weapon
scenes.content: AI is a very powerful 'tool'. If you use it correctly, you can make difficult things easier!
scenes.highlight:
Main Tools:
· NotebookLM → Research and organize
· Suno AI → Create music
· Codex → Create programs

scenes.speech: Choose today's training course and let's get started!
scenes.title: Choose Your Course
scenes.content: Select a course from the training categories. If you're unsure what to start with, ask Gal-chan!
scenes.highlight:
Recommended Courses:
🎬 Animation Training
💻 Programming Training
🎵 Music Training
🎥 Video Training

scenes.speech: Gal-chan, dojo training preparation is complete! Let's start training! 🌟
scenes.title: Training Begins!
scenes.content: You've learned the dojo rules and how to use the tools! Gal-chan is always cheering you on. Let's start training!
